response.overview: # THE HEIR  Ali, an ordinary village youth, lives with his adoptive parents, Pak Samad and Mak Bedah. Since adolescence until now, he has been having strange dreams and still doesn't understand why they always come to him. Ali is frequently visited by the same girl in his dreams. Ali is informed by Haji Mahfuz that he is the heir to the wealth of Tunku Ahmad and Tunku Kamariah and is asked to return home. Even more shocking is discovering that he has a twin. Ali plans to disguise himself as a gardener to get to know his family better. There, Ali falls in love with Zara, his family's adopted daughter. However, Ali is forced to accept that the girl is engaged to his twin.  ## EPISODE 1  Ali is an ordinary village youth. Days working at a factory, nights selling burgers. His daily routine is the same every day. He lives with his adoptive parents, Pak Samad and Mak Bedah, and every day he meets with his two best friends, Jambang and Malina (a tomboy girl).
response.title: Sang Pewaris
